citation: ironclad:field_sanity:2 — classify, strip, dedupe, flatten, cool_sort — never obtuse; never stack hot rebuild paths under thermo heat.

ironclad.citation: ironclad:field_sanity:1 — Grok16 forge layers meld into Ironclad — one integral pass across driver, compiler, mandate, profiles.

field_sanity.citation: ironclad:field_sanity:4 — Depth fields are to be sealed and destroyed — field_depth and field-on-field layers are sealed at every gate and eradicated from state; single field depth zero cannot persist.

spatial_existence.citation: ironclad:spatial_existence:1 — This one is here — the operator, the friendly, the witnessed entity carries a place receipt; individuality begins where geography can name it.

that_one.citation: ironclad:spatial_existence:2 — That one is there — remote claims, phantom bearings, and ventriloquist lanes stay that one until existence correlates; never collapse this one into that one.
